evidence_summary: Establish a high-concept transition from a grounded, nocturnal mountain landscape to an abstract cosmic void. The sequence must pivot on the visual presence of Mars to trigger a violent, non-linear displacement of the protagonist.

While observing the landscape, the protagonist becomes mesmerized by Mars (the red star). He feels an irresistible pull toward it. As he closes his eyes, he is violently transported through space into darkness and cold.
From mesmerized trance to sudden, overwhelming cosmic displacement.
